prompt: Create a high-end fashion editorial poster showing a monochrome vertical sliced portrait of a young woman with long dark hair. The canvas is a 4:3 landscape image with a deep black studio background and dramatic high-contrast black-and-white lighting. Divide the same woman’s head-and-shoulders portrait into exactly 5 tall vertical slices, separated by exactly 4 thin glowing white divider lines that run from the top edge to the bottom edge. Each slice shows the same face and outfit aligned as if one portrait has been cut into panels, but each panel has a distinct expression: 1) left slice, serious neutral gaze toward camera; 2) second slice, soft closed-mouth smile; 3) center slice, joyful open-mouth laugh facing forward; 4) fourth slice, thoughtful side glance looking to the viewer’s left with lips slightly parted; 5) right slice, eyes lowered with a calm introspective expression. Use glossy fashion-photography skin highlights, sharp facial detail, smoky eyes, defined eyebrows, natural lips, and voluminous black hair swept back and falling over the shoulders. She wears a simple dark ribbed sweater with a narrow light collar visible at the neckline. Keep the composition tightly cropped from upper chest to just above the hair, with the five face panels filling the frame edge to edge. Visual style: premium magazine campaign, cinematic studio portrait, crisp grayscale, strong contrast, subtle glow around divider lines, no text, no logos, no watermark, no extra faces beyond the 5 slices.
